nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql: SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS num_courses, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS num_faculty_members, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_active_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ea.evaluation_status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN a.id END) AS num_scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(COUNT(em.marks_awarded)) OVER (PARTITION BY au.id) AS avg_evaluation_marks_per_script FROM academic_unit au JOIN academic_unit_closure c ON au.id = c.descendant_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.department_id = au.id JOIN board b ON b.course_id = au.id JOIN answer_script a ON a.course_id = au.id LEFT JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id LEFT JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id GROUP BY au.name, au.id, fc.id, b.id
